message: fix(release): make rich_rust clone robust to missing USER

files.patch:
@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone rich_rust dependency
         run: |
           sudo mkdir -p /dp
-          sudo chown "$(whoami)" /dp
+          sudo chown "$(id -un)" /dp
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git /dp/rich_rust
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone rich_rust dependency
         run: |
           sudo mkdir -p /dp
-          sudo chown "$(whoami)" /dp
+          sudo chown "$(id -un)" /dp
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git /dp/rich_rust
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
@@ -146,7 +146,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone rich_rust dependency
         run: |
           sudo mkdir -p /dp
-          sudo chown "$(whoami)" /dp
+          sudo chown "$(id -un)" /dp
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git /dp/rich_rust
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
